---
title: ""
output: html_document
date: ''
---

<style type="text/css">
.title {
  display: none;
}

#getting-started img {
  margin-right: 10px;
}

</style>

<div class="row" style="padding-top: 30px;">

My name is **Benxia Hu**. I obtained my Ph.D. from the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences (UCAS), and Kunming Institute of Zoology, Chinese Academy of Sciences (KIZ,CAS) in 06/2018. I did my postdoctoral training in UNC-CH and UTH.  

My background is wet lab and dry lab.  

I would like to address biological questions of interest via Computational biology and functional experiments.  

My interest includes 3D genome architectures of human brain, Alzheimer's disease, Deep Learning and Linear Algebra.

</div>
